token.title: Token
token.description: Paste a compact JWT. The header and payload are decoded locally before any signature check runs.
token.label: JWT token

decoded.title: Decoded token
decoded.description: Pretty-printed JSON decoded from the token segment.
decoded.emptyTitle: Paste a JWT to decode it
decoded.emptyDescription: The tool expects the compact three-part JWT format: header.payload.signature.

verification.title: Signature verification
verification.description: Verify the JWS signature with a shared secret, PEM public key, JWK, or JWKS.
verification.algorithmDescription: Auto uses the alg value from the JWT header. Manual selection must still match the header.
verification.keyDescription: Use plain text for HS algorithms. Use a PEM public key, JWK, or JWKS for RS, PS, and ES algorithms. Values are not saved.
verification.keyPlaceholder:
secret

or

-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
...
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----

or

{"keys":[{"kty":"RSA","kid":"main",...}]}
verification.waitingDescription: Enter a valid token and verification material to check the signature.
verification.verifiedDescription: The signature matches the token header, payload, algorithm, and supplied key.
verification.failedDescription: The signature does not match the supplied key and algorithm.

claims.title: Registered claims
claims.description: Quick checks for common time-based JWT claims.
claims.emptyDescription: This payload does not include exp, nbf, or iat claims.

messages.payload-not-object: The payload is not a JSON object, so registered claims cannot be inspected.
messages.invalid-exp: The exp claim is present but is not a numeric date.
messages.invalid-nbf: The nbf claim is present but is not a numeric date.
messages.invalid-iat: The iat claim is present but is not a numeric date.

decodeErrors.empty-token: Paste a JWT to decode it.
decodeErrors.invalid-segment-count: JWTs must have exactly three dot-separated segments.
decodeErrors.empty-header-or-payload: The JWT header and payload segments cannot be empty.
decodeErrors.invalid-header-base64: The header segment is not valid base64url.
decodeErrors.invalid-payload-base64: The payload segment is not valid base64url.
decodeErrors.invalid-signature-base64: The signature segment is not valid base64url.
decodeErrors.invalid-header-json: The header segment is not valid JSON.
decodeErrors.invalid-payload-json: The payload segment is not valid JSON.
decodeErrors.header-not-object: The JWT header must decode to a JSON object.

verifyErrors.key-required: Enter a secret or public key before verifying.
verifyErrors.missing-algorithm: The JWT header does not include an alg value.
verifyErrors.algorithm-mismatch: The selected algorithm does not match the JWT header alg value.
verifyErrors.invalid-key-json: The JWK or JWKS input is not valid JSON.
verifyErrors.invalid-jwk: The key JSON must be a JWK object or a JWKS object with a keys array.
verifyErrors.empty-jwks: The JWKS keys array is empty.
verifyErrors.jwk-kid-not-found: No key in the JWKS matches the JWT header kid value.
verifyErrors.unsupported-key-format: Use plain text for HS algorithms, or a PEM public key, JWK, or JWKS for asymmetric algorithms.
verifyErrors.unsupported-pem-label: Only PEM public keys with BEGIN PUBLIC KEY are supported for verification.
verifyErrors.key-import-failed: The key could not be imported for the selected algorithm.
verifyErrors.webcrypto-unavailable: WebCrypto is not available in this browser context.
